items.name_en: !!️【Complete Original Packaging】!!️MiuMiu New Mini Bowling Bag, this Arcadie leather mini handbag conveys a fashion philosophy of transforming reflections on current reality into a unique silhouette. The soft design makes the bag look fuller, showcasing a metropolitan style. The tonal letter logo adds a unique beauty and classic touch. Detachable and adjustable leather shoulder strap, cotton satin lining with card slot.

items.name_en: !!️Full Original Retail Packaging!!️【New】Arcadie Matelasse Sheepskin Medium Tote/Shoulder Bag~Black Leather
items.name_cn:
!!️Full Original Retail Packaging!!️【New】Arcadie Matelasse Sheepskin Medium Tote/Shoulder Bag~Black Leather
This handbag uses Matelasse craftsmanship, with a three-dimensional texture and exquisite feel bringing a new interpretation to the classic silhouette. The front letter logo cleverly echoes the metal hardware, exquisite workmanship is outstanding, showing a distinctive classic style. Dynamic and elegant lines paired with a detachable adjustable shoulder strap present a practical and versatile design with modern charm.
~Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
~Zip closure
~Lined with 2 slip pockets
~With foot studs
Model: 5BB124.
Size: W24×H17×D7.5cm
Color: Black Full Leather/Original Leather.
Italian Creation

items.name_en: {Mini/Black} First Release
items.name_cn:
{Mini/Black} First Release
Miu Mi^mini Aventure Bag Charm
Turn a "best-selling handbag" into a charm. Following Miu's trend of turning best-selling items into charms, this includes Aventure, Arcadie, and Box Bag charms. The combination of large and small bags looks seamless, blending fashion and beauty. The mini bag can be used as a bag charm or crossbody, holding lipstick and car keys🔑. The ultimate aesthetic in the bag world🫶🏻
Size:Base Length 13×Base Width 5×Height 9cm

items.name_en: 《 packaging》💖 M's most special style this year, the Biker Bag, features new vintage soft-touch lambskin. Classic retro charm, soft leather, full leather lining, multi-pocket design blurs the line between function and decoration. Distinctive personality, versatile, sweet or edgy, large capacity. Almost every celebrity and fashion blogger has one, as popular as the previous MiuWander.
